subject: perf(export): use Uint8Array instead of base64 data URL for PDF images
body:
Switch from canvas.toDataURL() to canvas.toBlob() + Uint8Array for PDF
capture. jsPDF accepts Uint8Array directly, skipping the ~33% base64
encoding overhead and the subsequent parsing back to binary.

Tags: export, pdf, performance
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch
